block.header: yupu sareba woguranoyama ni pusu sika pa koyopi pa nakazu inenikye rasi mo

sentence.transcription: i ne ni kye rasi mo

block.header: imo ga tame ware tama piripu okipye n aru tama yosemotiko oki tu siranami
asagwiri ni nurenisi koromo posazusite pitori ka kimi ga yamadi kwoyu ramu
imo ga tame ware tama motomu okipye n aru siratama yoseko oki tu siranami
sirasaki pa sakiku arimate opobune ni makadi sizinuki mata kapyerimimu
minabye no ura sipo na miti sone kasima n aru turi suru ama wo mite kapyerikomu
asabiraki kogiidete ware pa yuranosaki turi suru ama wo mite kapyerikomu
yuranosaki sipo pwinikye rasi sirakamwi no iswo no uramwi wo apete kogu nari
kurwousigata sipopwi no ura wo kurenawi no tamamo suswopiki yuku pa ta ga tuma
kazanasi no pama no siranami itadurani koko ni yosekuru miru pito nasi ni
kazanasi no pama no siranami itadurani koko ni yoseku mo miru pito nasi ni
wa ga sekwo ga tukapi komu ka to idetati no ko no matubara wo kyepu ka sugwinamu
pudisirwo no misaka wo kwoyu to sirwotapeno wa ga koromode pa nurenikyeru kamo
senoyama ni momiti tune siku kamiwoka no yama no momiti pa kyepu ka tiru ramu
yamato ni pa kikoyeyukanu ka opoganwo no takapa karisiki ipori seri to pa
kwinokuni no mukasi satuwo no nariya moti ka torinabikesi saka no pe ni zo aru

sentence.transcription: saka no pe ni zo aru

block.header: kwinokuni ni yamazu kaywopamu tuma no mori tuma yosikosene tuma to ipinagara
kwinokuni ni yamazu kaywopamu tuma no mori tuma tamapanimo tuma to ipinagara
asamoyosi kwi pye yuku kimi ga matutiyama kwoyu ramu kyepu zo ame na puri sone
okurewite wa ga kwopwi woreba sirakumo no tanabiku yama wo kyepu ka kwoyu ramu
tokosipeni natu puyu yuke ya kapagoromo apugi panatazu yama ni sumu pito
imo ga te wo torite pikiyodi pusa tawori wa ga kazasu beku pana sakyeru kamo
paruyama pa tirisuguredomo miwayama pa imada pupumyeri kimi matikateni
kapa no se no tagiti wo mireba tama kamo tirimidaretaru kapa no tune kamo
pikwoposi no kazasi no tama pa tumagwopwi ni midarenikye rasi ko no kapa no se ni

sentence.transcription: ko no kapa no se ni

block.header: siratorino sagisakayama no matukage ni yadorite yukana ywo mo pukeyuku wo
aburiposu pito mo are ya mo nureginu wo ipye ni pa yarana tabi no sirusi ni
ariswopye ni tukite kogasane karapito no pama wo sugureba kwoposiku ari nari
takasima no adwokapanami pa sawaku tomo ware pa ipye omopu yadori kanasimi
tabi n areba ywonaka wo sasite teru tukwi no takasimayama ni kakuraku wosi mo
wa ga kwopuru imo pa apasazu tamanoura ni koromo katasiki pitori ka mo nemu

sentence.transcription: pito ri ka mo ne mu

block.header: tamakusige akemaku wosiki ataraywo wo koromode karete pitori ka mo nemu

sentence.transcription: pito ri ka mo ne mu

block.header: takupireno sagisakayama no siratutuzi ware ni nipopane imo ni simyesamu
imo ga kadwo iri idumigapa no tokonamye ni miyuki nokoreri imada puyu kamo
koromodeno nakwi no kapapye wo parusame ni ware tatinuru to ipye omopu ramu ka
ipyebito no tukapi naru rasi parusame no yokuredo ware wo nurasaku omopeba
aburiposu pito mo are ya mo ipyebito no parusame sura wo matukapi ni suru
opokura no iriye toyomu nari imepitono pusimi ga tawi ni kari wataru rasi
akikaze ni yamabuki no se no naru nabeni amakumo kakeru kari ni apu kamo
saywonaka to ywo pa pukenu rasi karigane no kikoyuru swora wo tukwi wataru miyu
imo ga atari sigeki karigane yupugwiri ni kinakite sugwinu subye naki madeni
kumogakuri kari naku toki pa akiyama no momiti katamatu toki pa suguredo
pusatawori tamu no yamagwiri sigemi ka mo posokapa no se ni nami no sawakyeru
puyugomori parupye wo kwopwite uwesi kwi no mwi ni naru toki wo katamatu ware zo
nubatamano ywogwiri pa tatinu koromodeno takaya no upe ni tanabiku madeni
yamasiro no kuse no sagisaka kamuyo ywori paru pa paritutu aki pa tirikyeri
parukusa wo uma kupiyama yu kwoyeku naru kari no tukapi pa yadori sugu nari
mikemukapu minabutiyama no ipapo ni pa purisi padare ka kiyenokoritaru
wagimokwo ga akamo pidutite uwesi ta wo karite wosamemu kuranasi no pama
momodutapu ya swo no simamwi wo kogikuredo apanokwosima si miredo akanu kamo

sentence.transcription: ya swo no sima mwi wo

block.header: ama no para kumo naki yopi ni nubatamano ywo wataru tukwi no iramaku wosi mo
taginoupe no mipunenoyama yu akidu pye ni kinakiwataru pa tare ywobukwodori
otitagiti nagaruru midu no ipa ni pure yodomyeru yodo ni tukwi no kage miyu
sasanami no pirayamakaze no umi pukeba turi suru ama no swode kapyeru miyu
siranamino pamamatu no kwi no tamukekusa ikuyo madeni ka tosi pa penu ramu
mitukapa no puti se mo otizu sade sasu ni koromode nurenu posu kwo pa nasi ni

sentence.transcription: posu kwo pa na si ni

block.header: adomopite kogiinisi pune pa takasima no adwo no minatwo ni patenikyemu kamo
teru tukwi wo kumo na kakusi so simakage ni wa ga pune patemu tomari sirazu mo
uma namete utimure kwoyeki ima mituru yosinwonokapa wo itu kapyerimimu
kurusiku mo kurenuru pi kamo yosinwogapa kiywoki kapara wo miredo akanaku ni
yosinwogapa kapanami takami tagi no ura wo mizu ka narinamu kwoposikyemaku ni

sentence.transcription: mi zu ka nari na mu

block.header: kapadu naku mututa no kapa no kapayagwi no nemokoro miredo akanu kapa kamo
mimaku pori kosiku mo siruku yosinwogapa oto no sayakesa miru ni tomosiku
inisipye no sakasiki pito no aswobikyemu yosinwo no kapara miredo akanu kamo
nanipagata sipopwi ni idete tamamo karu amawotomyedomo na ga na norasane
asari suru pito to wo mimase kusamakura tabi yuku pito ni wa ga na pa norazi
nagusamete koyopi pa nenamu asu ywori pa kwopwi ka mo yukamu ko yu wakarenaba

sentence.transcription: ko yopi pa ne na mu

block.header: akatoki no ime ni miyetutu kadisima no iswo kwosu nami no sikite si omopoyu
yamasina no ipata no wonwo no papaswopara mitutu ka kimi ga yamadi kwoyu ramu
yamasina no ipata no mori ni nusa okaba kedasi wagimo ni tadani apamu kamo
opobayama kasumi tanabiki saywo pukete wa ga pune patemu tomari sirazu mo
omopitutu kuredo kikanete miwogasaki managanoura wo mata kapyerimitu
takasima no adwo no minatwo wo kogisugwite sipotu suga ura ima ka kogu ramu
wagatatami mipye no kapara no iswo no ura ni kaku si moga mo to naku kapadu kamo
yama takami sirayupubana ni otitagitu natumwi no kapatwo miredo akanu kamo
opotagi wo sugwite natumwi ni tikadukite kiywoki kapase wo miru ga sayakesa

sinagatori apa ni tugitaru adusayumi suwe no tamana pa munawake no piroki wagimo kosiboso no sugaruwotomye no so no kapo no kirakirasiki ni pana no goto wemite tatereba tamapokono miti yuku pito pa ono ga yuku miti pa yukazute ywobanaku ni kadwo ni itarinu sasinarabu twonari no kimi pa arakazime onoduma karete kopanaku ni kagi sape maturu pito mwina no kaku matwopyereba kapo yoki ni yorite so imo pa taparete arikyeru
kanatwo ni si pito no kitateba ywonaka ni mo mwi pa tanasirazu idete so apikyeru

paru no pi no kasumyeru toki ni suminoye no kwisi ni idewite turibune no toworapu mireba inisipye no koto so omopoyuru midunoye no urasima no kwo ga katuwoturi tapituri pokori nanuka made ipye ni mo kozute unasaka wo sugwite kogiyuku ni watatumi no kamwi no wotomye ni tamasakani ikogimukapi apiatorapi kotonarisikaba kakimusubi tokoyo ni itari watatumi no kamwi no miya no uti no pye no tape naru tono ni tadusapari putari iriwite oi mo sezu sini mo sezusite nagaki yo ni arikyeru monowo yo no naka no orokapito no wagimokwo ni tugete kataraku simasiku pa ipye ni kapyerite titipapa ni koto mo katarapi asu no goto ware pa kinamu to ipikyereba imo ga ipyeraku tokoyopye ni mata kapyerikite ima no goto apamu to naraba ko no kusige piraku na yume to sokorakuni katamesi koto wo suminoye ni kapyerikitarite ipye miredo ipye mo mikanete satwo miredo satwo mo mikanete ayasi to soko ni omopaku ipye yu idete mitose no apida ni kaki mo naku ipye useme ya to ko no pakwo wo pirakite miteba moto no goto ipye pa aramu to tamakusige sukwosi piraku ni sirakumo no pakwo ywori idete tokoyopye ni tanabikinureba tatipasiri sakyebi swode puri koimarobi asizuri situtu tatimatini kokoro keusenu wakakarisi pada mo siwaminu kurwokarisi kami mo sirakenu yunayuna pa iki sape tayete noti tupini inoti sinikyeru midunoye no urasima no kwo ga ipyetokoro miyu

sentence.transcription: ware pa ki na mu to

block.header: tokoyopye ni sumu beki monowo turugitati na ga kokorokara oso ya ko no kimi

sinateru katasipagapa no saninuri no opopasi no upe yu kurenawi no akamo suswobiki yamaawi moti sureru kinu kite tada pitori iwatarasu kwo pa wakakusano tuma ka aru ramu kasinomwino pitori ka nu ramu topamaku no posiki wagimo ga ipye no siranaku

sentence.transcription: posi ki wa g imo ga

block.header: opopasi no tume ni ipye araba makanasiku pitori yuku kwo ni yadwo kasamasi wo
sakitama no wosakinonuma ni kamo zo panekwiru ono ga wo ni puriokyeru simo wo parapu to ni a rasi

sentence.transcription: puri ok ye ru simo wo
parapu to ni a ra si

block.header: mitugurino naka ni mukapyeru sarasiwi no tayezu kaywopamu soko ni tuma moga
topoduma si taka ni ariseba sirazu tomo taduna no pama no tadunekinamasi

sirakumono tatutanoyama no tagi no upe no wogura no mine ni sakiwoworu sakura no pana pa yama takami kaze si yamaneba parusame no tugite si pureba potuye pa tirisugwinikyeri siduye ni nokoreru pana pa simasiku pa tiri na magapi so kusamakura tabi yuku kimi ga kapyerikuru made
wa ga yuki pa nanuka pa sugwizi tatutapikwo yume ko no pana wo kaze ni na tirasi

sirakumono tatutanoyama wo yupugure ni utikwoyeyukeba taki no upe no sakura no pana pa sakitaru pa tirisugwinikyeri pupumyeru pa sakituginu besi kotigoti no pana no sakari ni aranedomo kimi ga miyuki pa ima ni si aru besi

sentence.transcription: ima ni si aru be si

block.header: itwoma araba nadusapiwatari mukatuwo no sakura no pana mo woramasi monowo

simayama wo iyukimegureru kapaswopi no wokapye no miti yu kinopu koso wa ga kwoyekosi ka pitoywo nomwi netarisi karani wo no upe no sakura no pana pa taki no se yu tirapite nagaru kimi ga mimu so no pi madeni pa yamaorosi no kaze na puki so to utikwoyete na ni opyeru mori ni kazamaturi sena

sentence.transcription: wa ga kwoye ko si ka
na ni op yeru mori ni

block.header: iyukiapi no saka no pumoto ni sakiwoworu sakura no pana wo misemu kwo moga mo

sentence.transcription: mise mu kwo mo ga mo

block.header: koromode pitatinokuni no putanarabu tukupanoyama wo mimaku pori kimi kimaseri to atukyeku ni ase kakinage konone tori usobukinobori wo no upe wo kimi ni misureba wokamwi mo yurusitamapi myekamwi mo tipapitamapite toki to naku kumowi ame puru tukupane wo sayani terasite ipukarisi kuni no mapora wo tubarakani simyesitamapeba uresimito pimo no wo tokite ipye no goto tokete zo aswobu utinabiku paru mimasi yu pa natukusa no sigeku pa aredo kyepu no tanwosisa
kyepu no pi ni ikani ka sikamu tukupane ni mukasi no pito no kikyemu so no pi mo

sentence.transcription: ki kye mu so no pi mo

block.header: ugupisu no kapigwo no naka ni pototogisu pitori umarete na ga titi ni nite pa nakazu na ga papa ni nite pa nakazu unopana no sakitaru nwopye yu tobikakeri kinaki toyomosi tatibana no pana wo witirasi pinemosuni nakedo kiki yosi mapi pa semu topoku na yuki so wa ga yadwo no panatatibana ni sumiwatare tori
kakikwirasi ame no puru ywo wo pototogisu nakite yuku nari apare so no tori

kusamakura tabi no urepe wo nagusamoru koto mo aru ka to tukupane ni noborite mireba wobana tiru situku no tawi ni karigane mo samuku kinakinu nipibari no toba no apumi mo akikaze ni siranami tatinu tukupane no yokyeku wo mireba nagaki ke ni omopitumikosi urepe pa yaminu
tukupane no suswomwi no tawi ni akita karu imogari yaramu momiti taworana

sentence.transcription: suswo mwi no ta wi ni

block.header: wasi no sumu tukupanoyama no mopakitu no so no tu no upe ni adomopite wotomye wotokwo no yukitudwopi kagapu kagapi ni pitoduma ni ware mo maziparamu a ga tuma ni pito mo kototopye ko no yama wo usipaku kamwi no mukasi ywori isamenu waza zo kyepu nomwi pa megusi mo na mi so koto mo togamu na

sentence.transcription: so no tu no upe ni
megu si mo na mi so

block.header: wo no kamwi ni kumo tatinobori sigure puri nuretoporu tomo ware kapyerame ya
mimoro no kamunabwiyama ni tatimukapu mikaki no yama ni akipagwi no tuma wo makamu to asadukuywo akemaku wosimi asipikwino yamabikwo toyome ywobitatenaku mo
asu no yopi apazarame ya mo asipikwino yamabikwo toyome ywobitatenaku mo
kurapasinoyama wo takami ka ywogomori ni idekuru tukwi no katamatigataki
pisakatano ama no gapa ni kami tu se ni tamapasi watasi simo tu se ni pune ukesuwe ame purite kaze pukazu tomo kaze pukite ame purazu tomo mo nurasazu yamazu kimase to tamapasi watasu
ama no gapa kwiri tatiwataru kyepu kyepu to wa ga matu kimi si punade su rasi mo
wagimokwo pa kusiro ni aranamu pidarite no wa ga oku no te ni makite inamasi wo

sentence.transcription: wa ga oku no te ni

block.header: toyokuni no kaparu pa wagipye pimo no kwo ni itugari woreba kaparu pa wagipye
iswonokami puru no wasada no po ni pa idezu kokoro no uti ni kwopuru ko no koro
kaku nomwi si kwopwi si watareba tamakiparu inoti mo ware pa wosikyeku mo nasi

sentence.transcription: wosi kye ku mo na si

block.header: mimoro no kamwi no obaseru patusegapa miwo si tayezupa ware wasureme ya
okurewite ware pa ya kwopwimu parukasumi tanabiku yama wo kimi ga kwoyeinaba
okurewite ware pa ya kwopwimu inaminwo no akipagwi mitutu inamu kwo yuweni
kamunabwi no kamwiyoriita ni suru sugwi no omopi mo sugwizu kwopwi no sigeki ni
taratineno papa no mikoto no koto ni araba tosinowo nagaku tanomisugusamu
patusegapa yupu watarikite wagimokwo ga ipye no kadwo ni si tikadukinikyeri
tayurakinoyama no wonope no sakurabana sakamu parupye pa kimi si sinwopamu

sentence.transcription: yama no wo no pe no

block.header: kimi nakupa na zo mwi yosopamu kusige n aru tuge no wogusi mo toramu to mo omopazu

sentence.transcription: tora mu to mo omopa zu

block.header: asu ywori pa ware pa kwopwimu na naporiyama ipa puminarasi kimi ga kwoyeinaba
inoti wo si masakiku moga mo naporiyama ipa puminarasi mata mata mo komu

sentence.transcription: ma saki ku mo ga mo

block.header: kotopiusino miyake no ura ni sasimukapu kasima no saki ni saninuri no wobune wo make tamamaki no wokadi sizinuki yupusipo no miti no totomi ni mipunakwo wo adomopitatete ywobitatete mipune idenaba pama mo seni okurenamiwite koimarobi kwopwi ka mo woramu asizuri si ne nomwi ya nakamu unakami no so no tu wo sasite kimi ga kogiyukaba
umi tu di no nagwinamu toki mo wataranamu kaku tatu nami ni punade su besi ya

sentence.transcription: puna de su be si ya

block.header: yuki koso pa parupi kiyu rame kokoro sape kiyeusetare ya koto mo kaywopanu
matugapyeri sipite are ya pa mitugurino nakanobori konu maro to ipu yatukwo
watatumi no idure no kamwi wo inoraba ka yukusa mo kusa mo pune no payakyemu

sentence.transcription: yuku sa mo ku sa mo

block.header: pito to naru koto pa kataki wo wakurabani nareru wa ga mwi pa sini mo iki mo kimi ga manima to omopitutu arisi apida ni utusemino yo no pito nareba opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi amazakaru pina wosame ni to asatorino asadati situtu muratori no mura tatiyukaba tomariwite ware pa kwopwimu na mizu pisanaraba

sentence.transcription: nar eru wa ga mwi pa

block.header: mikwosidi no yuki puru yama wo kwoyemu pi pa tomareru ware wo kakete sinwopase

utusemino yo no pito nareba opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi sikwisimano yamatonokuni no iswonokami puru no satwo ni pimo tokazu marone wo sureba wa ga kitaru koromo pa narenu miru gotoni kwopwi pa masaredo iro ni ideba pito sirinu bemi puyu no ywo no akasi mo enu wo i mo nezuni ware pa so kwopuru imo ga tadaka ni
puruyama yu tadani miwatasu miyakwo ni so i mo nezu kwopuru topoku aranaku ni
wagimokwo ga yupitesi pimo wo tokame ya mo tayeba tayu tomo tadani apu madeni

akipagwi wo tumadopu ka koso pitorigwo ni kwo moteri to ipe kakwozimono wa ga pitorigwo no kusamakura tabi ni si yukeba takadama wo sizini nukitari ipapibe ni yupu torisidete ipapitutu wa ga omopu agwo masakiku arikoso

sentence.transcription: wa ga pito ri gwo no

block.header: tabipito no yadori semu nwo ni simo puraba wa ga kwo pagukumye ame no tadumura

siratama no pito no so no na wo nakanakani koto wo sitapape apanu pi no maneku sugureba kwopuru pi no kasanariyukeba omopiyaru tadoki wo sirani kimomukapu kokoro kudakete tamatasuki kakenu toki naku kuti yamazu wa ga kwopuru kwo wo tamakusiro te ni torimotite maswokagami tadameni mineba sitapiyama sita yuku midu no upe ni idezu wa ga omopu kokoro yasukaranu kamo

sentence.transcription: pito no so no na wo

block.header: kakipo nasu pito no yokogoto sigemi ka mo apanu pi maneku tukwi no penu ramu
tatikapari tukwi kasanarite apanedomo sane wasurayezu omokage nisite
imoragari imakwi no mine ni sigeritatu tumamatu no kwi pa purupito mikyemu
momitiba no sugwinisi kwora to tadusapari aswobisi iswo wo mireba kanasi mo

sentence.transcription: sugwi ni si kwo ra to

block.header: sipoke tatu ariswo ni pa aredo yuku midu no sugwinisi imo ga katami to so kosi

sentence.transcription: kata mi to so ko si

block.header: inisipye ni imo to wa ga misi nubatamano kurwousigata wo mireba sabusi mo

sentence.transcription: imo to wa ga mi si

block.header: tamatusima iswo no uramwi no managwo ni mo nipopite yukana imo mo purekyemu

wokakitu no asa wo pikiposi imo nane ga tukurikisekyemu sirwotapeno pimo wo mo tokazu pitopye yupu obi wo mipye yupi kurusiki ni tukapematurite ima dani mo kuni ni makarite titipapa mo tuma wo mo mimu to omopitutu yukikyemu kimi pa tori ga naku aduma no kuni no kasikwoki ya kamwi no misaka ni nikipada no koromo samurani nubatamano kami pa midarete kuni twopedo kuni wo mo norazu ipye twopedo ipye wo mo ipazu masurawo no yuki no manima ni koko ni koyaseru

sentence.transcription: tuma wo mo mi mu to

block.header: inisipye no masurawotokwo no apikipopi tumadopi sikyemu asiya no unapiwotomye no okutukwi wo wa ga tati mireba nagaki yo no katari ni situtu notipito no sinwopi ni semu to tamapokono miti no pye tikaku ipa kamape tukureru tuka wo amakumo no sokupye no kagiri ko no miti wo yuku pito gotoni yukiyorite itatinagekapi aru pito pa ne ni mo nakitutu kataritugi sinwopitugikosi wotomyera ga okutukwidokoro ware sape ni mireba kanasi mo inisipye omopeba
inisipye no sinwodawotokwo no tumadopisi unapiwotomye no okutukwi zo kore
kataritugu karani mo kokoda kwoposiki wo tadameni mikyemu inisipyewotokwo

titipapa ga nasi no manima ni pasimukapu oto no mikoto pa asatuyuno keyasuki inoti kamwi no muta araswopikanete asipara no midupo no kuni ni ipye nami ya mata kapyerikonu topotukuni yomwi no sakapi ni papututano ono ga mukimuki amakumono wakare si yukeba yamwiywo nasu omopimatwopapi iyusisino kokoro wo itami asikakino omopimidarete parutorino ne nomwi nakitutu adisapapu yworu piru sirazu kagirwopwi no kokoro moyetutu kanasibwiwakaru
wakarete mo mata mo apu beku omopoyeba kokoro midarete ware kwopwime ya mo
wakarete mo mata mo apu beku omopoyeba kokorotukusite ware kwopwime ya mo
asipikwino arayamanaka ni okuriokite kapyerapu mireba kokoro kurusi mo

toriganaku aduma no kuni ni inisipye ni arikyeru koto to ima madeni tayezu ipikuru katusika no mama no tegwona ga asaginu ni awokubi tuke pitasawo wo mo ni pa orikite kami dani mo kaki pa kedurazu kutu wo dani pakazu yukedomo nisikiaya no naka ni tutumyeru itukigwo mo imo ni sikame ya motidukwi no tareru omowa ni pana no goto wemite tatereba natumusi no pwi ni iru ga goto minatwoiri ni pune kogu gotoku yukikagure pito no ipu toki ikubaku mo ikyerazi monowo nani su to ka mwi wo tanasirite nami no oto no sawaku minatwo no okutukwi ni imo ga koyaseru topoki yo ni arikyeru koto wo kinopu si mo mikyemu ga goto mo omopoyuru kamo

sentence.transcription: mi kye mu ga goto mo

block.header: katusika no mama no wi mireba tatinarasi midu kumasikyemu tegwona si omopoyu

asiya no unapiwotomye no yatosekwo no kataopwino toki yu wobanari ni kami taku madeni narabiwiru ipye ni mo miyezu utuyupu no komorite woreba mitesi ka to ibusemu toki no kakipo nasu pito no twopu toki tinuwotokwo unapiwotokwo no puseyataku sususikipopi apiywobapi sikyeru toki pa yakitati no takami osineri siramayumi yuki toriopite midu ni iri pwi ni mo iramu to tatimukapi kipopisi toki ni wagimokwo ga papa ni kataraku situtamaki iyasiki wa ga yuwe masurawo no araswopu mireba ikyeri tomo apu beku are ya sisikusiro yomwi ni matamu to komorinuno sitapape okite utinageki imo ga inureba tinuwotokwo so no ywo ime ni mi toritutuki opiyukikyereba okuretaru unapiwotokwo i ame apugi sakyebiorabi asizuri si kikami takyebwite mokorowo ni makete pa arazi to kakipaki no wotati toripaki tokorotura tomeyuki kyereba ugaradwoti iyukitudwopi nagaki yo ni sirusi ni semu to topoki yo ni kataritugamu to wotomyetuka naka ni tukurioki wotokwotuka konata kanata ni tukuriokyeru yuweyosi kikite siranedomo nipimo no goto mo nenakituru kamo

sentence.transcription: ipye ni mo mi ye zu
pwi ni mo ira mu to
so no ywo ime ni mi

block.header: asiya no unapiwotomye no okutukwi wo yukiku to mireba ne nomwi si nakayu
tuka no upe no konoye nabikyeri kikisi goto tinuwotokwo ni si yorinikye rasi mo
